storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_dice_game_phase1_title}Set the table
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_dice_game_phase1_setup}First night. A blanket stretched between two crates, a borrowed cup, three pairs of bones. Half the company will play if the stakes are right. {PLAYER_NAME} sets them. The wrong number tonight is the difference between three quiet evenings and a sergeant standing over you with questions.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_dice_game_phase1_deep_pockets}Deep pockets. Real silver on the blanket.
{=endeavor_rogue_dice_game_phase1_low_stakes}Low stakes. Quiet table, quiet purses.
{=endeavor_rogue_dice_game_phase1_fold_table}Fold the blanket. Sleep instead.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_dice_game_phase2_title}A bad loss
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_dice_game_phase2_setup}Second night. A spearman three cups deep loses a week's pay on a single throw and won't have it. He goes for his belt knife. The crowd between you breathes in and waits. {LORD_NAME}'s pickets are not far. A loud word would carry.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_dice_game_phase2_press_him}Press him. Coin owed is coin owed.
{=endeavor_rogue_dice_game_phase2_smooth_it}Buy him a cup. Settle for half. Smile.
{=endeavor_rogue_dice_game_phase2_give_back}Hand back his coin. Walk away.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_smuggle_wine_phase1_title}The barrel
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_smuggle_wine_phase1_setup}Southern red. A full barrel sweating in a wagon the QM hasn't tallied. The driver wants it gone before the count and won't ask twice. {PLAYER_NAME} stands in the dark with the seal still warm. There are three ways to move it tonight.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_smuggle_wine_phase1_wagon_run}Take the wagon. Drive it out past the pickets.
{=endeavor_rogue_smuggle_wine_phase1_bottle_run}Decant it. Carry it out a bottle at a time.
{=endeavor_rogue_smuggle_wine_phase1_tip_qm}Tip the quartermaster. Walk away clean.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_smuggle_wine_phase2_title}Short by one
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_smuggle_wine_phase2_setup}Third day. The buyer's count is short by one bottle and he is not a man who forgets. The QM is asking quiet questions about a missing wax seal. Two stories pull at {PLAYER_NAME} and only one of them stays standing past tomorrow.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_smuggle_wine_phase2_blame_drover}Blame the drover. He's already fled.
{=endeavor_rogue_smuggle_wine_phase2_charm_buyer}Charm the buyer down. Make up the bottle yourself.
{=endeavor_rogue_smuggle_wine_phase2_confess_short}Eat the loss. Hand the QM the seal back.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_pickpocket_phase1_title}Mark a purse
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_pickpocket_phase1_setup}Followers' lane at first light. Washerwomen, peddlers, a smith's wife counting copper at the end of a row. {PLAYER_NAME} walks it twice and decides which throat the day's coin hangs at. The choice of mark is the choice of how much risk you carry into the next three days.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_pickpocket_phase1_fat_purse}The peddler. Heavy belt, slow eyes.
{=endeavor_rogue_pickpocket_phase1_small_lifts}Three light lifts across the lane. Coppers only.
{=endeavor_rogue_pickpocket_phase1_walk_off}Keep your hands at your sides. Walk through.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_pickpocket_phase2_title}A face that remembers
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_pickpocket_phase2_setup}Second day. A woman in the lane stops short and stares at {PLAYER_NAME} like she has counted a thing twice and come up wrong. She does not call out. Not yet. Whatever comes next decides whether her cry reaches the pickets at dusk.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_pickpocket_phase2_lift_again}Hold her gaze. Lift the man behind her.
{=endeavor_rogue_pickpocket_phase2_buy_silence}Slip her a coin. Smile like you owe it.
{=endeavor_rogue_pickpocket_phase2_vanish}Turn into the crowd. Lose the day.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_black_market_phase1_title}The buyer
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_black_market_phase1_setup}A man in a stained surcoat at the back of a tavern in the camp town. Looted blades, looted silver, looted boots — he buys all of it without asking where the bodies fell. {PLAYER_NAME} sets his cut. The cut sets how loud the door closes on the way out.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_black_market_phase1_full_haul}Move the full haul. Take the fat price.
{=endeavor_rogue_black_market_phase1_trickle_sale}Trickle it out across the week. Boring is safe.
{=endeavor_rogue_black_market_phase1_sell_to_qm}Hand the lot to the QM at half the price.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_black_market_phase2_title}A second buyer
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_black_market_phase2_setup}Fourth day. A second man finds {PLAYER_NAME} at the back gate. He says the first buyer is a thief who pays in clipped coin. He offers double — and a longer ride to a quieter cellar. The first buyer does not like to be cut out.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_black_market_phase2_second_buyer}Take the double. Let the first man learn.
{=endeavor_rogue_black_market_phase2_play_both}Talk both up. Sell each what you don't have.
{=endeavor_rogue_black_market_phase2_stay_first}Refuse the second man. Stay with the first.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase1_title}Find the room
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase1_setup}A real ring needs four walls and a man at the door. {PLAYER_NAME} walks the camp town in the rain and considers the options. A back room costs more and breathes easier. A surgeon's tent costs nothing and stinks of blood. Whichever you choose decides how the rest of the week sounds.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase1_back_room}Rent the tavern's back room. Pay loudly.
{=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase1_surgeon_tent}Use the surgeon's tent after dark. Cheap, foul.
{=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase1_delay_open}Walk it back. The rain is too heavy tonight.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase2_title}A heavy loser
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase2_setup}Third night. A junior officer of {LORD_NAME}'s lays a month of pay on the table and loses it before the bones stop moving. He sits very still. He understands what was done to him. {PLAYER_NAME} can read his shoulders from across the room.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase2_let_him_lose}Let him lose. Coin is coin.
{=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase2_fix_one_throw}Fix one throw his way. Buy his silence.
{=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase2_return_pay}Slide his pay back across the table. Take nothing.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase3_title}A knock at the door
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase3_setup}Sixth night. A knock that isn't a player's knock. A sergeant on the other side of the door, breathing hard, half-drunk, asking by name for the man who runs the room. The week's coin sits in three bags under the table. {PLAYER_NAME} has a heartbeat to choose.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase3_open_proud}Open the door. Offer him a seat at the table.
{=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase3_bribe_sergeant}Crack the door. Slide him a bag.
{=endeavor_rogue_gambling_ring_phase3_kill_lights}Kill the lights. Wait him out in the dark.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_bribe_officer_phase1_title}The approach
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_bribe_officer_phase1_setup}A junior officer of {LORD_NAME}'s drinks alone behind the supply tent on his off-night. {PLAYER_NAME} carries a purse heavier than a {PLAYER_RANK}'s pay should explain. The first move sets the price of every move after. Officer corruption is a hanging offense; he knows that as well as you do.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_bribe_officer_phase1_open_silver}Lay the purse on the crate between you.
{=endeavor_rogue_bribe_officer_phase1_talk_first}Drink with him an hour. Speak in shapes, not numbers.
{=endeavor_rogue_bribe_officer_phase1_walk_back}Pocket the purse. Walk past him to the latrines.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_bribe_officer_phase2_title}A second pair of eyes
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_bribe_officer_phase2_setup}Third day. The officer wants a second meeting. He brings another man with him this time — a friend, he says. {PLAYER_NAME} has not heard the friend's name before. The friend looks a great deal like an officer of the watch out of uniform. The next breath either pays for everything or hangs for it.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_bribe_officer_phase2_name_the_price}Name the price aloud. Force them both to choose.
{=endeavor_rogue_bribe_officer_phase2_split_purse}Split the purse. Buy the friend in too.
{=endeavor_rogue_bribe_officer_phase2_burn_meeting}Stand. Excuse yourself. Never come back.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_resolution_success_generic_title}Walk away clean
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_resolution_success_generic_setup}{PLAYER_NAME} sleeps with a heavier purse and an empty doorway. No knock. No questions at first muster. {LORD_NAME} signs the morning's roster without lifting his eyes. The trick of getting away with a thing is to never look back at it.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_resolution_success_generic_continue}Continue.
options.tooltip: {=endeavor_rogue_resolution_success_generic_continue_tt}+75 XP Roguery. Gold and small lord favor.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_resolution_partial_generic_title}Coin earned, eyes earned
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_resolution_partial_generic_setup}{PLAYER_NAME} counts the coin in the dark and sets some aside for the day a sergeant comes asking. There is a man at morning muster who watches a beat too long. Nothing is said. Nothing yet.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_resolution_partial_generic_continue}Continue.

storylets.title: {=endeavor_rogue_resolution_failure_generic_title}Caught
storylets.setup: {=endeavor_rogue_resolution_failure_generic_setup}A hand on {PLAYER_NAME}'s shoulder before first light. The sergeant has it written in plain words. {LORD_NAME} reads the page and does not raise his voice. A flogging at noon, perhaps worse if the wrong officer signs the order. The coin is gone. The face of every witness is not.

options.text: {=endeavor_rogue_resolution_failure_generic_continue}Continue.
